parameters.content:
## Contract Renewal Risk Monitor & Alert
This workflow scans active contracts on a daily schedule, finds those approaching their renewal date, and scores each one for churn risk using usage and engagement signals. High-risk renewals trigger an account manager task, a CRM note, a Slack heads-up, and an email summary so the team can act before the contract lapses. This closes the silent revenue leak of renewals slipping past their deadline unattended.

### How it Works

	-	Runs automatically every morning on a schedule.
	-	Pulls active contracts from the CRM or data source.
	-	Filters to contracts renewing inside the warning window.
	-	Drops records with missing dates or owners.
	-	Scores renewal risk from usage and engagement signals.
	-	Checks whether the risk crosses the alert threshold.
	-	Classifies each renewal as Low, Medium, or High risk.
	-	Creates a renewal task for the account owner.
	-	Logs a note back to the CRM record.
	-	Sends a Slack alert and an email digest to the team.

### Setup Steps

	1.	Connect the HubSpot account that holds your contract data.
	2.	Set the renewal warning window in days in the Filter node.
	3.	Adjust the risk threshold in the Score node.
	4.	Connect the Asana account for renewal task creation.
	5.	Connect your Slack account and select the alert channel.
	6.	Connect Gmail for the account manager email digest.
	7.	Set the schedule time to suit your team timezone.
	8.	Activate the workflow so it runs automatically.

## Step 1: Fetch & Filter Contracts

This section runs daily, pulls all active contracts from the CRM, and keeps only those whose renewal date falls inside the warning window. It removes any records missing a date or an owner so the rest of the flow works with clean data.

## Step 2: Score & Detect Risk

These nodes calculate a renewal risk score from usage and engagement signals, decide whether the score crosses the alert threshold, and classify each contract as Low, Medium, or High risk. Only at-risk renewals continue past this phase.

## Step 3: Task, Note & Notify

When a renewal is flagged at risk, the workflow creates a task for the account owner, logs a note on the CRM record, posts a Slack alert, and emails a digest to the team so the renewal gets a proactive touch before the deadline.
